model_name: HYM HAMT2.0 R13 DRIVE ONLY (turn77 + can.zip final rev3)
notes: Drive-channel-only final model pack for turn77. Timing sensitivity relaxed: period WARN 250%, ERR 300%, TTL WARN 3.5x, ERR 4.0x expected period. Reserved alarms removed where can.zip proves bytes are active constants. Static value alarms remain only on objectively meaningful fields.

signals.name: Motor mode
signals.description: Mode/control byte; no standalone alarm

signals.name: Motor RPM Command
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 command RPM from bytes2-3
signals.alarm_message: Motor rpm cmd out of range

signals.name: Motor Interlock
signals.description: Control state field; no standalone alarm

signals.name: Motor Forward signal
signals.description: Command state field; no standalone alarm

signals.name: Motor Reverse signal
signals.description: Command state field; no standalone alarm

signals.name: Reserved byte6
signals.description: Expected 0x00 in provided drive log
signals.alarm_message: VCU drive command reserved byte6 non-zero

signals.name: Reserved byte7
signals.description: Expected 0x00 in provided drive log
signals.alarm_message: VCU drive command reserved byte7 non-zero

signals.name: Reserved byte8
signals.description: Expected 0x00 in provided drive log
signals.alarm_message: VCU drive command reserved byte8 non-zero

signals.name: Actual Motor RPM
signals.description: Little-endian int16 actual motor RPM from bytes1-2
signals.alarm_message: Motor rpm feedback out of range

signals.name: Motor Current
signals.description: Current mapping not fully closed; monitor only

signals.name: Motor Voltage
signals.description: Voltage word from bytes5-6; objective pack-level plausibility only

signals.name: Reserved byte7
signals.description: Expected 0x00 in provided drive log

signals.name: Drive Error code
signals.description: Observed always 0 in provided drive log

signals.name: Actual Motor Angle
signals.description: Motor/encoder angle, not wheel angle; monitor only until kinematic mapping is closed
